violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea at time of inspection. Procedures printed and provided to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) observed with blackish/red/pinkish residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Observed ice buildup in chest freezer located next to ice machine. Also observed a little ice buildup in whipped cream freezer located in front area of establishment. Ice shall be broken down and removed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
